title: always_comb, always_ff, always_latch
body:
There has to be an issue for this already, but for some reason I am unable to find it. I see that it was mentioned in issue https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/issues/97, but I see no follow-up to this.

I think out of all three the main priority is for ``always_comb`` and ``always_ff``, I don't think ``always_latch`` is used very often (my best guess is that these two are easier to implement also).
